initial_program:
% Grid dimensions and row/col predicates
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Guess the two distinct nonzero cells (R1,C1,V1) and (R2,C2,V2)
pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), V1 != V2, C1 <= C2.
1 { pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) : true } 1 :- true.

% Rowspecific occurrence of the guessed colours
row_has_V1(R) :- input(R, C1, V1).
row_has_V2(R) :- input(R, C2, V2).

% Mode predicates
pattern_mode :- C1 < C2.
uniform_mode :- C1 = C2.

% Column condition predicates (only active when pattern_mode is true)
condV1(C) :- col(C), (C - C1) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = 0, C >= C1.
condV2(C) :- col(C), (C - C1) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = (C2 - C1), C >= C2.

% Allowed predicate for each output cell
allowed(R, C, Color) :- row(R), col(C), pattern_mode, condV1(C), Color = V1.
allowed(R, C, Color) :- row(R), col(C), pattern_mode, condV2(C), Color = V2.
allowed(R, C, 0)   :- row(R), col(C), pattern_mode, not uniform_mode, not condV1(C), not condV2(C), Color = 0.

allowed(R, C, Color) :- row(R), col(C), row_has_V1(R), uniform_mode, Color = V1.
allowed(R, C, Color) :- row(R), col(C), row_has_V2(R), uniform_mode, Color = V2.
allowed(R, C, 0)   :- row(R), col(C), not row_has_V1(R), not row_has_V2(R), uniform_mode, Color = 0.

% Choose exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : allowed(R, C, Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% Definition of the output cell set
output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

#show output/3.

% Grid dimensions and row/col predicates
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Guess the two distinct nonzero cells (R1,C1,V1) and (R2,C2,V2)
pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), V1 != V2, C1 <= C2.
1 { pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) : true } 1 :- true.

% Rowspecific occurrence of the guessed colours
row_has_V1(R) :- input(R, C1, V1).
row_has_V2(R) :- input(R, C2, V2).

% Mode predicates
pattern_mode :- C1 < C2.
uniform_mode :- C1 = C2.

% Column condition predicates (only active when pattern_mode is true)
condV1(C) :- col(C), (C - C1) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = 0, C >= C1.
condV2(C) :- col(C), (C - C1) \ ((C2 - C1) * 2) = (C2 - C1), C >= C2.

% Allowed predicate for each output cell

% Grid dimensions and row/col predicates
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Guess the two distinct nonzero cells (R1,C1,V1) and (R2,C2,V2)
pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), V1 != V2, C1 <= C2.
#count{pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2)} = 1.

% Domain predicates for guessed variables
c1(C1) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).
c2(C2) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).
v1(V1) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).
v2(V2) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).

% Mode predicates
pattern_mode :- C1 < C2.
uniform_mode :- C1 = C2.

% Column condition predicates (only active when pattern_mode is true)
condV1(C) :- col(C), C = C1.
condV2(C) :- col(C), C = C2.

% Output colors definitions
output(R,C,V1) :- row(R), col(C), pattern_mode, condV1(C).
output(R,C,V2) :- row(R), col(C), pattern_mode, condV2(C).
output(R,C,0)  :- row(R), col(C), not pattern_mode, uniform_mode.

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

final_program:
% Grid dimensions and row/col predicates
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Guess the two distinct nonzero cells (R1,C1,V1) and (R2,C2,V2)
pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), V1 != V2, C1 <= C2.
#count{pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2)} = 1.

% Domain predicates for guessed variables
c1(C1) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).
c2(C2) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).
v1(V1) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).
v2(V2) :- pair(R1,C1,V1,R2,C2,V2).

output(R,C,V2) :- row(R), col(C), pattern_mode, condV2(C).
output(R,C,0)  :- row(R), col(C), not pattern_mode, uniform_mode.
